models.Bounty: A task posted by an organization with a defined reward, requirements, and deadline. Bounties move through a lifecycle: Draft, Live, Paused, Closed.
models.Category: A grouping label for bounties, used for filtering and organization.
models.StatusHistoryEntry: A timestamped record of a bounty's status change, forming the lifecycle timeline.

relationships: Bounty belongs to an Organization (implied by the business admin's org)
Bounty has many StatusHistoryEntry records forming its lifecycle timeline
Bounty has a Category for filtering and discovery

bounties.title: Share Our Product Launch on Twitter/X
bounties.description: Help us spread the word about our latest product launch by sharing it with your audience on Twitter/X.
bounties.instructions:
1. Follow our account @AcmeLabs on Twitter/X.
2. Retweet the pinned launch post with a genuine comment about why you're excited.
3. Your account must have at least 200 followers.
4. Screenshot your retweet showing the engagement (likes, retweets).
bounties.eligibilityCriteria: Must have a Twitter/X account with at least 200 followers. Account must be at least 6 months old.
bounties.proofTemplate:
Please provide:
- Link to your retweet
- Screenshot showing engagement metrics
bounties.termsAndConditions: Submissions using bot accounts or purchased followers will be rejected. One submission per participant.

bounties.title: Write a 500-Word Blog Review of Our SaaS Platform
bounties.description: We're looking for honest, detailed reviews of our project management platform from real users who have tried it.
bounties.instructions:
1. Sign up for a free trial at acmelabs.io.
2. Use the platform for at least 3 days.
3. Write a 500+ word review covering: first impressions, key features you tried, pros and cons, and who you'd recommend it to.
4. Publish the review on your blog or Medium.
5. Submit the link to your published review.
bounties.eligibilityCriteria: Must have an active blog or Medium account with at least 3 prior published posts.
bounties.proofTemplate:
Please provide:
- Link to your published review
- Brief summary of your experience (2-3 sentences)
bounties.termsAndConditions: Review must be original content. AI-generated reviews will be rejected. Minimum 500 words required.

bounties.title: Beta Test Our Mobile App and Report Bugs
bounties.description: Join our beta testing program and help us find bugs before the public release of our mobile app.
bounties.instructions:
1. Download the beta app from TestFlight (iOS) or the provided APK link (Android).
2. Use the app for at least 1 hour across different features.
3. Document any bugs you find with: steps to reproduce, expected behavior, actual behavior, and a screenshot or screen recording.
4. Submit your bug report using the template below.
bounties.eligibilityCriteria: Must have either an iOS device (iOS 16+) or Android device (Android 12+). Prior QA or beta testing experience preferred but not required.
bounties.proofTemplate:
Bug Report Template:
- Device & OS version:
- Feature tested:
- Steps to reproduce:
- Expected behavior:
- Actual behavior:
- Severity (Low/Medium/High/Critical):
- Screenshot/recording attached
bounties.termsAndConditions: NDA required — do not share app details publicly. Duplicate bug reports will only reward the first submission.

bounties.title: Complete Our Product-Market Fit Survey
bounties.description: Help us understand how our product fits your workflow by completing a detailed 15-minute survey.
bounties.instructions:
1. You must be a current or former user of our platform.
2. Complete the survey at the link provided after claiming this bounty.
3. Answer all questions honestly — there are no right or wrong answers.
4. Submit a screenshot of the completion page.
bounties.eligibilityCriteria: Must have an active or recently cancelled account on our platform.
bounties.termsAndConditions: One submission per participant. Incomplete surveys will be rejected.

bounties.title: Design 3 Instagram Story Templates for Our Brand
bounties.description: Create a set of 3 cohesive Instagram Story templates that match our brand guidelines and can be reused by our marketing team.
bounties.instructions:
1. Review our brand kit (colors, fonts, logo) shared after you claim the bounty.
2. Design 3 Story templates in Figma or Canva: one for product announcements, one for customer testimonials, and one for tips/educational content.
3. Each template should include placeholder text and image areas.
4. Export as editable Figma/Canva links plus PNG previews.
bounties.eligibilityCriteria: Must have a portfolio demonstrating graphic design skills. Figma or Canva proficiency required.
bounties.proofTemplate:
Please provide:
- Link to editable templates (Figma or Canva)
- PNG preview of all 3 templates
- Brief explanation of design decisions
bounties.termsAndConditions: All designs become the property of Acme Labs upon approval. Do not use stock images with restrictive licenses.

bounties.title: Translate Our Landing Page Copy to Spanish
bounties.description: We need a native Spanish speaker to translate our main landing page copy, including headlines, feature descriptions, and CTA buttons.
bounties.instructions:
1. We'll provide the English copy document after you claim the bounty.
2. Translate all sections naturally — no machine translations.
3. Maintain the marketing tone and persuasive language.
4. Submit the translated document in Google Docs format with both languages side by side for review.
bounties.eligibilityCriteria: Native Spanish speaker. Professional translation experience preferred.
bounties.proofTemplate:
Please provide:
- Google Docs link with side-by-side translation
- Note any sections where you chose a localized phrasing over literal translation and why
bounties.termsAndConditions: Machine-translated submissions will be rejected. Translation becomes property of Acme Labs.

bounties.title: Record a 2-Minute Video Testimonial
bounties.description: Share your experience with our platform in a short, authentic video testimonial we can feature on our website and social media.
bounties.instructions:
1. Record a 1-2 minute video (selfie-style or webcam is fine).
2. Cover: who you are, what you use our product for, and what you like most about it.
3. Good lighting and clear audio required — no background music.
4. Upload the raw video file (MP4 preferred, minimum 720p).
bounties.eligibilityCriteria: Must be an active user of our platform for at least 30 days.
bounties.termsAndConditions: By submitting, you grant Acme Labs the right to use your video on our website and social channels. You may request removal at any time.

bounties.title: Refer 5 Qualified Leads to Our Sales Team
bounties.description: Know businesses that could benefit from our platform? Introduce them to our sales team and earn a reward for each qualified lead that books a demo.
bounties.instructions:
1. Identify 5 businesses in your network that fit our ICP (B2B SaaS companies, 50-500 employees).
2. Make a warm introduction via email (CC our sales team at sales@acmelabs.io).
3. A lead is 'qualified' when they book and attend a 30-minute demo call.
4. Submit the email thread showing the introduction for each lead.
bounties.eligibilityCriteria: Open to all participants. Leads must be new contacts not already in our CRM.
bounties.proofTemplate:
For each lead, provide:
- Company name and contact person
- Screenshot of the introduction email
- Confirmation that demo was booked (we'll verify internally)
bounties.termsAndConditions: Reward is per 5 qualified leads, not per individual lead. Self-referrals are not eligible.
